markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Onboard Bailey to the Ambient account and review its content process.](https://fathom.video/share/qpH6Bf_uP4PsRdTmxc_PpTM9PHef8hu9?tab=summary&timestamp=4.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Process Bottlenecks:** Client reviews are the primary blocker, causing a \~6-week delay per article. This is compounded by a recent CMS migration that has paused all publishing.](https://fathom.video/share/qpH6Bf_uP4PsRdTmxc_PpTM9PHef8hu9?tab=summary&timestamp=138.0)
  - [**Strategic Misalignment:** The client's lead-gen goals are at odds with the slow review process. A key messaging error—confusing the "95% false alarm reduction" metric (for Access Control) with Threat Detection—has been corrected.](https://fathom.video/share/qpH6Bf_uP4PsRdTmxc_PpTM9PHef8hu9?tab=summary&timestamp=504.0)
  - [**ME Workload:** Mariana's workload has tripled to cover the roles of three former team members, raising concerns about bandwidth.](https://fathom.video/share/qpH6Bf_uP4PsRdTmxc_PpTM9PHef8hu9?tab=summary&timestamp=721.0)
  - [**Path Forward:** Bailey will address the CMS issue and propose process fixes (e.g., in-ContentOS briefs) to accelerate approvals and rebuild trust.](https://fathom.video/share/qpH6Bf_uP4PsRdTmxc_PpTM9PHef8hu9?tab=summary&timestamp=1536.0)

## Topics

### Client Context & Goals

  - [**Product:** AI system for threat/incident detection, layered over cameras and access control.](https://fathom.video/share/qpH6Bf_uP4PsRdTmxc_PpTM9PHef8hu9?tab=summary&timestamp=50.0)
  - [**Core Messaging:** Focus is on **incident prevention** and **threat detection**, not "threat prevention."](https://fathom.video/share/qpH6Bf_uP4PsRdTmxc_PpTM9PHef8hu9?tab=summary&timestamp=98.0)
  - [**Primary Goal:** Generate leads to fill the sales pipeline.](https://fathom.video/share/qpH6Bf_uP4PsRdTmxc_PpTM9PHef8hu9?tab=summary&timestamp=1085.0)
  - [**Key Error Corrected:** The "95% false alarm reduction" metric was incorrectly tied to Threat Detection. It applies only to the secondary Access Control feature.](https://fathom.video/share/qpH6Bf_uP4PsRdTmxc_PpTM9PHef8hu9?tab=summary&timestamp=526.0)

### Process Bottlenecks

  - [**Slow Reviews:** The main blocker; reviews take \~6 weeks per article.](https://fathom.video/share/qpH6Bf_uP4PsRdTmxc_PpTM9PHef8hu9?tab=summary&timestamp=1453.0)
  - [**CMS Migration:** A recent, unannounced migration has paused all publishing.](https://fathom.video/share/qpH6Bf_uP4PsRdTmxc_PpTM9PHef8hu9?tab=summary&timestamp=212.0)
      - [The new CMS is unusable for publishing, and a walkthrough request to Atul (Product Marketing) is pending.](https://fathom.video/share/qpH6Bf_uP4PsRdTmxc_PpTM9PHef8hu9?tab=summary&timestamp=212.0)
  - [**Inefficient Review Workflow:**](https://fathom.video/share/qpH6Bf_uP4PsRdTmxc_PpTM9PHef8hu9?tab=summary&timestamp=146.0)
      - [**Self-Assignment:** Reviewers (Atul, Mal, Alberto) self-assign articles in ContentOS, creating confusion.](https://fathom.video/share/qpH6Bf_uP4PsRdTmxc_PpTM9PHef8hu9?tab=summary&timestamp=146.0)
      - [**Redundant Briefs:** A separate Google Doc brief is required for each topic, adding an unnecessary approval step.](https://fathom.video/share/qpH6Bf_uP4PsRdTmxc_PpTM9PHef8hu9?tab=summary&timestamp=1570.0)

### Content Strategy & Pipeline

  - [**Deliverable:** 5 articles/week.](https://fathom.video/share/qpH6Bf_uP4PsRdTmxc_PpTM9PHef8hu9?tab=summary&timestamp=14.0)
  - [**Pipeline Status:** Healthy, with a few weeks' topic runway.](https://fathom.video/share/qpH6Bf_uP4PsRdTmxc_PpTM9PHef8hu9?tab=summary&timestamp=576.0)
  - [**Content Focus:**](https://fathom.video/share/qpH6Bf_uP4PsRdTmxc_PpTM9PHef8hu9?tab=summary&timestamp=311.0)
      - [**Competitor Comparisons:** A successful format the client wants more of.](https://fathom.video/share/qpH6Bf_uP4PsRdTmxc_PpTM9PHef8hu9?tab=summary&timestamp=311.0)
      - [**Integration Series:** A new pitch to cover integrations with major VMS and camera brands.](https://fathom.video/share/qpH6Bf_uP4PsRdTmxc_PpTM9PHef8hu9?tab=summary&timestamp=1395.0)
      - [**Vertical-Specific:** Content for key verticals like schools (e.g., "gun detection for schools").](https://fathom.video/share/qpH6Bf_uP4PsRdTmxc_PpTM9PHef8hu9?tab=summary&timestamp=1372.0)
  - [**AI Tooling:** Claude is used to replicate article templates and add internal links, improving efficiency.](https://fathom.video/share/qpH6Bf_uP4PsRdTmxc_PpTM9PHef8hu9?tab=summary&timestamp=387.0)

### Team Roles & Workload

  - [**Role Consolidation:** Mariana now handles the work of three former team members, including:](https://fathom.video/share/qpH6Bf_uP4PsRdTmxc_PpTM9PHef8hu9?tab=summary&timestamp=721.0)
      - [Content generation](https://fathom.video/share/qpH6Bf_uP4PsRdTmxc_PpTM9PHef8hu9?tab=summary&timestamp=721.0)
      - [Keyword research & assignment creation](https://fathom.video/share/qpH6Bf_uP4PsRdTmxc_PpTM9PHef8hu9?tab=summary&timestamp=721.0)
      - [Reporting & client communication](https://fathom.video/share/qpH6Bf_uP4PsRdTmxc_PpTM9PHef8hu9?tab=summary&timestamp=721.0)
  - [**Role Clarification:** Bailey confirmed the ME's role is to own keyword research and topic generation, with the EM providing high-level strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/qpH6Bf_uP4PsRdTmxc_PpTM9PHef8hu9?tab=summary&timestamp=721.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Bailey:**](https://fathom.video/share/qpH6Bf_uP4PsRdTmxc_PpTM9PHef8hu9?tab=summary&timestamp=1536.0)
      - [Get a CMS walkthrough from the client to unblock publishing.](https://fathom.video/share/qpH6Bf_uP4PsRdTmxc_PpTM9PHef8hu9?tab=summary&timestamp=950.0)
      - [Propose moving article briefs into ContentOS to accelerate approvals.](https://fathom.video/share/qpH6Bf_uP4PsRdTmxc_PpTM9PHef8hu9?tab=summary&timestamp=1570.0)
      - [Clarify the ME's role in keyword research and topic generation.](https://fathom.video/share/qpH6Bf_uP4PsRdTmxc_PpTM9PHef8hu9?tab=summary&timestamp=721.0)
  - [**Mariana:**](https://fathom.video/share/qpH6Bf_uP4PsRdTmxc_PpTM9PHef8hu9?tab=summary&timestamp=1758.0)
      - [Update the client report and send the link to Bailey.](https://fathom.video/share/qpH6Bf_uP4PsRdTmxc_PpTM9PHef8hu9?tab=summary&timestamp=1758.0)
